title: Sailing to victory
description: KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna Yacht Club (KYC) once...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna Yacht Club (KYC) once again proved its sailing excellence with a commanding display at the recent 2025 Finn National Championships, hosted by the Pretoria Sailing Club.","html":"KNYSNA NEWS - Knysna Yacht Club (KYC) once again proved its sailing excellence with a commanding display at the recent 2025 Finn National Championships, hosted by the Pretoria Sailing Club."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Representing KYC were five of the club's top Finn sailors: Ken Reynolds (Commodore), Dudley Isaac (Vice Commodore), Dave Shilton (five-time South African champion and defending titleholder), Georgou \"Yogi\" Divaris (2024 runner-up) and Jacques Louw."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"From the first race, KYC sailors set a formidable standard, consistently finishing within the top 15 in every race. The highlight of the regatta was Divaris's phenomenal performance, who dominated the competition by winning all 10 races - an extraordinary feat that earned him both the youth trophy and the national title.","html":"From the first race, KYC sailors set a formidable standard, consistently finishing within the top 15 in every race. The highlight of the regatta was Divaris's phenomenal performance, who dominated the competition by winning all 10 races - an extraordinary feat that earned him both the youth trophy and the national title."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Final standings"},{"type":"list","items":["Georgou \"Yogi\" Divaris - 1st","Dave Shilton - 2nd","Dudley Isaac -7th","Jacques Louw - 9th","Ken Reynolds -13th"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Reynolds praised the team's dedication and performance, noting that the results \"reflect years of hard work, teamwork, and commitment to excellence\".","html":"Reynolds praised the team's dedication and performance, noting that the results \"reflect years of hard work, teamwork, and commitment to excellence\"."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
